ddls:
CREATE TABLE "travel_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the travel service (e.g., Flights, Hotels, Trains, Holidays) */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the travel service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the test environment (e.g., Development, Staging, Production) */,
  "environment_description" TEXT /* Description of the test environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "browsers" (
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each browser */,
  "browser_name" TEXT /* Name of the browser (e.g., Chrome, Firefox, iE) */,
  "browser_version" TEXT /* Version of the browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("browser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_types" (
  "trip_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip type */,
  "trip_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the trip type (e.g., RoundTrip, One way) */,
  "trip_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the trip type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testers" (
  "tester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tester */,
  "tester_name" TEXT /* Name of the tester */,
  "tester_email" TEXT /* Email of the tester */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel service being tested */,
  "test_case_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "execution_status" TEXT /* Status of the test case execution (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  "excel_file" TEXT /* Name of the Excel file containing test data */,
  "trip_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip type */,
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the browser used for testing */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test environment */,
  "tester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tester assigned to the test case */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date the test case was executed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_tester_id FOREIGN KEY ("tester_id") REFERENCES testers ("tester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES travel_services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_trip_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_type_id") REFERENCES trip_types ("trip_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES test_environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_browser_id FOREIGN KEY ("browser_id") REFERENCES browsers ("browser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case that was executed */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test case (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date the test case was executed */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test environment where the test case was executed */,
  "tester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the test case */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the test case execution in seconds */,
  "log_file" TEXT /* File path to the log file generated during the test */,
  "screenshot" TEXT /* File path to the screenshot taken during the test */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the test result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_tester_id FOREIGN KEY ("tester_id") REFERENCES testers ("tester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES test_environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case execution */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case that was executed */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date the test case was executed */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test environment where the test case was executed */,
  "tester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the test case */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the test case execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_executions_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_executions_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES test_environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_executions_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_executions_tester_id FOREIGN KEY ("tester_id") REFERENCES testers ("tester_id")
)
